name: FIVE BELOW, INC
business: Five Below is a specialty value retailer offering trend-right, high-quality products, with most priced at $5 and below, across eight category worlds including Candy, Style, Party, Room, Create, Tech, Sports, and New & Now. The company targets the 'kid and the kid in all of us' demographic, aiming to appeal to children, teens, and value-oriented customers. As of January 31, 2026, it operated 1,921 stores in 46 states and also sells merchandise online via its website and mobile app.

exposures.sentence: We also offer our merchandise on the internet, through our fivebelow.com e-commerce website and mobile app, offering home delivery and the option to buy online and pick up in store.

We offer a dynamic, edited assortment of exciting products, most priced at $5 and below, including select brands and licensed merchandise across eight worlds: Candy, Style, Party, Room, Create, Tech, Sports and New & Now.

If we are unable to secure our customers confidential or credit card information, or other private data relating to our crew or our Company, we could be subject to negative publicity, costly government enforcement actions or private litigation, which could damage our business reputation and adversely affect our financial results.

We use, and may over time increase the usage of, machine learning and other types of artificial intelligence in our business, and challenges with properly managing its use could adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Plan to open approximately 150 net new stores in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: we plan to open approximately 150 net new stores in fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Executed lease agreements for 73 new stores in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: As of January 31, 2026, we have executed lease agreements for the opening of 73 new stores in fiscal 2026.

catalysts.event: Cash capital expenditures of $230 million to $250 million in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to make cash capital expenditures of approximately $230 million to $250 million in fiscal 2026, which exclude the impact of tenant allowances, and which we expect to fund from cash generated from operations, cash on-hand, investments and, as needed, borrowings under our Revolving Credit Facility.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase authorization up to $100 million through November 27, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On November 27, 2023, our Board of Directors approved a new share repurchase program for up to $100 million of our common stock through November 27, 2026.
